Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Ray Berger Gutters to get the job done right.

“Ray Berger Gutters installed a new gutter system on my house in the Highlands, and I couldn't be happier! The team was professional, efficient, and the gutters look fantastic. They really took the time to explain the different options and helped me choose the best system for my needs. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Gutter Installation
Mar 15, 2025

“Had a leak in my gutters after a bad storm. Called Ray Berger Gutters, and they came out the next day to fix it. The repair was quick and affordable. Appreciated their prompt service!”

John B. Gutter Repair
Nov 20, 2024

“Ray Berger Gutters cleaned my gutters and downspouts, which were completely clogged with leaves. They did a thorough job and left my property clean. I'll definitely be using them again!”

Emily K. Gutter Cleaning
Sep 8, 2024

“I had Ray Berger Gutters install gutter guards on my home. I'm so glad I did! No more climbing ladders to clean out gutters. It's been a huge time saver, and the guards seem to be working perfectly.”

David L. Gutter Guards
Jan 22, 2025

“One of my downspouts was damaged and causing water to pool near my foundation. Ray Berger Gutters repaired it quickly and professionally. They even recommended a downspout extension to better direct the water away from my house. Great service!”

Jessica T. Downspout Repair
Dec 5, 2024

“Ray Berger Gutters recently installed new seamless gutters on my business in NuLu. The team was efficient, professional, and the new gutters look great! They even helped me choose a color that matched the building perfectly. Highly recommend their services!”

Michael S. Gutter Installation
Apr 10, 2025
Ray Berger Gutters

Trusted gutter company professionals serving Louisville, KY and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
